overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia traversing a misty marshland environment. The character walks through tall grass, wades into a foggy lake, swims across open water, and explores the marshy shoreline. The scene features atmospheric morning lighting with low-hanging mist and autumnal vegetation.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through tall grass toward the misty lake shore

entered.detail: tall green and yellow grass covering the ground
dense coniferous trees forming the distant backdrop
fog-covered body of water with low visibility over surface
small moss-covered rock formation among the grass

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through an open marshy grassland with tall vegetation swaying in the morning breeze. The camera follows from behind as he approaches a misty lake surrounded by distant pine forests under a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow lake entry with aquatic reeds

events.description: character steps from grassy bank into shallow water, beginning to wade

agents.ego_description: Geralt wading into the lake, water level rising from ankles to chest as he progresses deeper

entered.detail: clear water with visible submerged grass and ripples
green aquatic reeds growing at the water's edge
rocks visible beneath the water surface

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters the lake, wading through shallow water with reeds lining the shore. The water gradually deepens as he moves forward, transitioning from the grassy bank into the misty aquatic environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: open lake water with distant tree-lined shore

events.description: transition from wading to swimming as water becomes too deep to stand

agents.ego_description: Geralt swimming across the open lake using a breaststroke motion toward the distant shore

entered.detail: tree-covered landmass on the opposite side of the lake
small landmass with sparse vegetation in the lake
bright glare of morning sun reflecting off the water surface

segments.scene_description: Geralt swims across the open lake, with the camera showing the expansive water surface and morning sun breaking through clouds. The distant shoreline and a small island become visible through the mist as he progresses across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: marshy lakeshore with scattered birch trees

events.description: character exits the water and transitions to walking on marshy shore
approaches a red dead creature or item lying on the shore

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the marshy shoreline, navigating through tall grass and examining the environment

entered.detail: wet grassy bank with patches of mud and rocks
white-barked trees with sparse autumn leaves
red-colored dead monster or animal lying on the ground near water's edge
evergreen trees dotting the marshy landscape

segments.scene_description: Geralt emerges from the water onto a marshy shore lined with bare birch trees and tall grass. He continues exploring the wetland perimeter, passing through misty atmospheric conditions, and approaches a red dead creature lying on the rocky shore near the water's edge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a breezy marshy grassland into a misty lake and finally onto a rocky shoreline. It begins with Geralt walking through tall, swaying vegetation toward a distant pine forest under a partly cloudy morning sky. As he reaches the water's edge, the camera follows him wading through shallow reeds before the terrain shifts into an open aquatic environment where he swims across the expansive lake. The scene then opens up as the morning sun breaks through the clouds, revealing a distant island and shoreline through the lifting mist. Finally, the camera tracks Geralt as he emerges from the water onto a marshy bank lined with bare birch trees, moving across the wetland perimeter toward a red dead creature lying on the rocky shore.
